scenario: Scenario 2 - GetBoard after red-teaming both survivors with keep_productizable

candidates.cheapest_kill_test: Cold-call 3 mid-market ops leads to verify if they still buy from external vendors for onboarding automation.
candidates.kill_argument: This bet failed because the vendor onboarding automation market was too fragmented — enterprise buyers consolidated to internal tools before any solo founder could gain traction.

candidates.cheapest_kill_test: Interview 2 prior buyers to confirm they switched to commodity vendors and ask what price point was the breaking point.
candidates.kill_argument: This bet failed because the commodity players undercut pricing by 40% in Q2 2024 and no differentiation was sustainable without a platform moat.
